overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character in a futuristic exosuit traversing a rainy, mountainous landscape. The character walks steadily along rocky paths and grassy slopes carrying a large cargo backpack, with distant industrial structures visible through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountainside path with large boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along a narrow dirt path between large rock formations

entered.detail: massive gray rock outcrop covered in patches of moss
rolling green hills extending into the distance
steep incline covered with scattered boulders

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky mountainside path with rain falling steadily. The character walks forward between large rock formations on the left and a sloping hillside on the right, traversing a narrow dirt trail through the sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy meadow with scattered rocks

events.description: terrain opens from narrow rocky passage into wider grassy meadow

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through tall grass and scattered boulders in the open meadow

entered.detail: wide expanse of green grass with wild vegetation
randomly distributed rocks across the grassland
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open grassy meadow with moderate vegetation. The character walks through tall grass past scattered boulders, with distant mountains now visible on the horizon through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ridge approaching distant industrial structure

events.description: distant industrial tower structure becomes visible on the horizon through the mist

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant tower structure while navigating rocky terrain

entered.detail: tall industrial tower or crane visible through atmospheric haze
low-lying fog and mist gathering in the valley below
jagged rock formations lining the path

segments.scene_description: As the character continues forward, a distant industrial tower structure emerges through the mist on the horizon. The terrain becomes rockier with a prominent ridge on the left and a misty valley visible to the right.

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the rocky ridge path with the misty valley visible below

entered.detail: large weathered boulders along the ridge edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a rocky ridge with the misty valley now dominating the center view. The distant tower fades from view as the character focuses on navigating the rocky terrain overlooking the fog-covered valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy mountainous landscape that shifts from narrow rocky paths to an expansive, fog-covered valley. It begins with the character traversing a narrow dirt trail squeezed between large rock formations and a sloping hillside under steady rain. As the path opens up, the camera follows the character through a grassy meadow filled with tall vegetation and scattered boulders, revealing distant mountains on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward a rockier ridge as a distant industrial tower emerges through the mist, while the terrain to the right drops away into a hazy void. Finally, the camera focuses on the character navigating the rugged ridge as the tower fades from view and the vast, fog-shrouded valley dominates the landscape.
